question: Will China GDP growth in Q1 2026 be between 5.0% and 5.5%?

fragility_points: A broad March downside surprise would materially weaken the thesis.

key_assumptions: The initial Q1 2026 NBS GDP release stays on the normal quarterly cadence.

quote_anchors: If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.
